title: lepidagathis thorelii
intro: Lepidagathis thorelii, also known as Thore's Lepidagathis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. Lepidagathis thorelii has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to various health benefits, including wound healing and the treatment of infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, for its therapeutic uses.
